name: Radix Vue
description: Unstyled, accessible Vue components for building high-quality design systems and web apps

description.value: Unstyled, accessible Vue components for building high-quality design systems and web apps

initial-release.comment: First published to npm on June 23, 2023

github-stars.comment: As of December 2025, repository shows 6,000 stars

framework.comment: Vue.js exclusive, compatible with Vue 3 and Nuxt

styling-approach.comment: Completely unstyled primitives, developers apply their own styling via classes and data attributes

component-model.comment: Headless component library providing behavior and accessibility without styles

typescript.comment: Fully-typed API with first-class TypeScript support, 31.7% TypeScript codebase

ssr-compatible.comment: Dedicated SSR guide available, works with Nuxt and other Vue SSR frameworks

rsc-compatible.comment: Not applicable - Vue library, RSC is React-specific

design-system.comment: Headless library with no design system; users implement their own

dark-mode.comment: Supports dark mode through ConfigProvider with localStorage and system preference detection

theming-system.comment: No built-in theming system - unstyled components allow complete custom theming

css-variables.comment: No built-in CSS variables; developers implement their own styling approach

design-tokens.comment: No design tokens provided - headless library

rtl-support.comment: RTL support via ConfigProvider with dir='rtl' prop

component-count.comment: 43 distinct component primitives as of v1.9.17

text-input.comment: Headless library focuses on complex components; basic inputs expected to be native HTML

textarea.comment: Not provided - use native HTML textarea

select.comment: Custom Select component with accessibility and keyboard navigation

multi-select.comment: Select component is single-select; use Tags Input or Combobox for multi-selection

checkbox.comment: Checkbox component with indeterminate state support

radio.comment: Radio Group component for radio button groups

switch-toggle.comment: Switch component for boolean toggle values

slider.comment: Range slider with single or dual-thumb support

number-input.comment: Number Field component with increment/decrement controls

tag-input.comment: Tags Input for multiple tag/token entry with add/remove

pin-input.comment: Pin Input for OTP/PIN code entry with individual digit boxes

time-picker.comment: No dedicated time picker; DatePicker supports time via CalendarDateTime

date-range-picker.comment: Select start and end dates with Date Range Picker and Date Range Field

input-groups.comment: Not provided as a distinct component

input-with-dropdown.comment: Not provided, but can be composed using Combobox or Popover

button-groups.comment: Toggle Group acts as segmented button control

split-button.comment: Not provided, but can be composed with Dropdown Menu

table.comment: Not provided - use native HTML table or community libraries

data-table.comment: Not provided - use community solutions like TanStack Table

virtual-infinite-list.comment: Depends on @tanstack/vue-virtual for virtualization support in Tree and other components

tree-view.comment: Hierarchical tree with keyboard navigation, multiple selection, virtual scrolling; drag-drop via integration

list-view.comment: Listbox component for styled lists with keyboard navigation

card.comment: Not provided - layout component beyond primitive scope

avatar.comment: Avatar with image and fallback support

badge.comment: Not provided - simple display component beyond primitive scope

tag-chip-pill.comment: Not provided as standalone component; Tags Input includes tag display

calendar.comment: Calendar and Range Calendar for month/week views

alert.comment: Not provided as static alert; Alert Dialog available for modal alerts

toast-notification.comment: Toast component with auto-dismiss, swipe gestures, and accessibility features

progress-bar.comment: Linear progress indicator with ARIA progressbar role

progress-circle.comment: Not provided; Progress component is linear only

modal-dialog.comment: Dialog and Alert Dialog components with focus management and accessibility

drawer-sheet.comment: Not provided; Dialog can be styled as drawer

popover.comment: Floating content anchored to trigger with positioning via Floating UI

tooltip.comment: Hover hint component with accessibility support

dropdown-menu.comment: Action menu with keyboard navigation and submenus

context-menu.comment: Right-click context menu with keyboard support

command-palette.comment: Not provided; can be composed with Dialog and Combobox

tabs.comment: Tab-based content switching with keyboard navigation

vertical-tabs.comment: Tabs component supports both horizontal and vertical orientation

breadcrumb.comment: Not provided - navigation component beyond primitive scope

stepper.comment: Multi-step process indicator and navigation (added in v1.9.0)

navigation-menu.comment: Site navigation with dropdown support and keyboard navigation

sidebar.comment: Not provided; use Collapsible or custom implementation

grid.comment: Not provided - CSS layout beyond primitive scope

stack.comment: Not provided - CSS layout beyond primitive scope

container.comment: Not provided - CSS layout beyond primitive scope

splitter.comment: Resizable split panes with keyboard and mouse control

rich-text-editors.comment: No official integrations; Editable component is for simple inline text only

form-libraries.comment: No official form library bindings; works with any Vue form library via v-model

animation-libraries.comment: Motion One explicitly recommended; @vueuse/motion documented; Vue Transition built-in support via forceMount

icon-libraries.comment: No bundled icons; documentation examples use Radix Icons but no official integration

date-libraries.comment: @internationalized/date is a required dependency for date components

aria-compliant.comment: Adheres to WAI-ARIA design patterns with automatic aria and role attributes

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard navigation support across all interactive components

screen-reader-tested.comment: Tested in commonly used assistive technologies according to documentation

focus-management.comment: Automatic focus management including focus trapping in modals and programmatic focus movement

wcag-level.comment: No specific WCAG level documented; adheres to WAI-ARIA patterns

accessibility-rating.comment: Excellent - WAI-ARIA compliant, keyboard navigation, screen reader tested, focus management, based on accessibility-focused Radix UI

bundle-size-full.comment: 122.9 KB minified + gzipped for full package

bundle-size-core.comment: Not applicable - individual components are imported separately, tree-shakeable

tree-shakeable.comment: ES modules support tree-shaking; import only components you need

zero-runtime.comment: JavaScript runtime required for component behavior and accessibility

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be imported individually and loaded on demand

documentation-quality.comment: Excellent - comprehensive API docs, interactive examples, guides for styling/animation/composition/SSR/i18n, code examples

interactive-docs.comment: Documentation includes interactive component examples and Stackblitz demos

storybook.comment: Uses Histoire (Storybook alternative) accessible at localhost:6006 during development

figma-kit.comment: No Figma kit documented - headless library without visual design

cli-generator.comment: No CLI tool; components installed via npm

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: 265,580 weekly downloads for week of December 16-22, 2025

active-maintenance.comment: Very active - v1.9.17 released December 23, 2025; 143 total releases; regular updates

commercial-support.comment: Community-led open source project; Discord support available but no commercial tier

style-override.comment: Class attributes for styling, data-state attributes for state-based styling; no built-in CSS variables but users can implement

compound-components.comment: Extensive use of compound component pattern (e.g., DialogRoot, DialogTrigger, DialogContent)

render-props.comment: Uses Vue slots and composition rather than render props pattern

slots.comment: Vue slots used throughout; asChild prop enables advanced slot composition

unstyled-mode.comment: Entirely unstyled by default - headless component library
